entry.title: New IDC HSFEHQ12D0882 awarded to NISTAC E for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO PROVIDE ARCHITECH AND ENGINEER SERVICE TO THE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAM.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFEHQ12D0882 (P00004) awarded to NISTAC E, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS UNILATERAL ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION IS TO ADD MONIQUE WADDELL AND SEAN WILLIAMS AS CONTRACTING OFFICERS WITH SIGNATURE AUTHORITY. THIS CONTRACT PROVIDES PROFESSIONAL SERVICES TO FEMA PUBLIC ASSISTANCE OPERATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFEHQ12D0882 (P00005) awarded to NISTAC E, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REASSIGN MR. EDDIE MURPHY FROM THE PRIMARY COR POSITION TO THE SECONDARY ALTERNATE COR POSITION. MS. DONNA BANKS IS ASSIGNED THE PRIMARY COR RESPONSIBILITIES AND MS. SHERRY SAVOY RETAINS THE FIRST ALTERNATE COR ROLE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFEHQ12D0882 (P00008) awarded to NISTAC E, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD III TO EXTEND PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE TO FEB 26, 2016 AND TO MAKE OTHER ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES AND CORRECTIONS. PUBLIC ASSISTANCE TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
